description_long: This is a modern, floor-standing radiator with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded top edges. The front panel features a subtle embossed circular pattern and a digital control interface with a display screen and several buttons, suggesting advanced electronic controls. The top surface has a recessed grille for air flow, likely for heat dissipation, and the radiator stands on two sturdy metal feet. The side views reveal a slim profile with visible venting and what appears to be a power switch and cable port, indicating it is electrically powered. The back is plain and unadorned, with no visible pipe connections, reinforcing its likely use as an electric radiator. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for contemporary urban interiors or public spaces.
description: A sleek, floor-standing electric radiator with a digital control panel, embossed front design, and top air grille, supported by metal feet.
description_view_0: Front view showing the embossed circular pattern, digital control panel, and main body of the radiator.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim profile, power switch, cable port, and venting details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned surface with no visible controls or connections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the slim profile and venting.
attribute_pipe_connections: none visible; likely electric power port on side
attribute_fin_arrangement: internal horizontal panels, not externally visible
attribute_grille_pattern: rectangular top grille with parallel horizontal slats
